stemHtml: Per ICAO Doc 9433, under which circumstance may a civil aircraft be intercepted?

options.a: Requesting a flight plan change after departure.
options.b: TAS variation exceeding 3% from the planned speed.
options.c: Time estimate for the next reporting point changes by more than 2 minutes.
options.d: Deviating from a designated ATS route without an apparent valid reason.
